131 N1C N1C_EVENING 36c(N1c)Time Awake - Evening CHAR 1 Identifies those periods of a typical evening (over the last seven days) when the patient was awake all or most of the time (not more than one hour nap duirng any such period). 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
